title: Vacation Budget Calculator - Plan Your Trip Costs
description: Free vacation budget calculator. Estimate total trip costs including flights, hotel, food, activities, and transportation.
keywords: vacation budget calculator, trip cost calculator, travel budget planner, vacation cost estimator, holiday budget
intro: Plan your vacation budget. Enter trip details to get a cost estimate for flights, accommodation, food, and activities.

faq.q: How much should I budget for vacation?
faq.a: A typical domestic vacation costs $150-$300 per person per day. International trips average $200-$500 per person per day.

faq.q: What percentage of income should go to vacations?
faq.a: Financial experts suggest budgeting 5-10% of annual net income for vacations and travel.

faq.q: How can I save on vacation costs?
faq.a: Travel off-season, book flights 6-8 weeks ahead, use points/miles, cook some meals, and look for free activities.
